hero.title: Optimize images now. Upload starts here.
hero.subtitle: Drop files, choose strategy, and export with predictable quality. Everything runs in your browser.

promo.card1_desc: Adaptive profiling that reduces weight without collapsing visual quality.
promo.card2_desc: Choose original, JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or Auto from the same flow.
promo.card3_desc: Modular code, Web Worker processing, and static hosting compatibility.

app.queue_hint: Drop files and optimization starts with the current settings. Reprocess later if you adjust anything.

engine.init_title: Drop images here or click to select
engine.init_desc: Supports PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP and AVIF.
engine.error_fallback: Could not process with the selected strategy.
engine.format_hint_max_compression: For stronger compression, choose WebP or AVIF when you do not need to keep the original format.
engine.value_line: Save time across batches with private, fast and predictable compression.

how.title: How it works
how.page_intro: A deterministic browser pipeline tuned for fast production work.
how.step1_desc: The Worker inspects dimensions, transparency and visual complexity before compression.
how.step2_desc: The strategy selects the best pipeline for each file profile and chosen mode.
how.step3_desc: Download individual files or a ZIP, with format, savings and result diagnostics per item.

formats.title: Output formats
formats.page_intro: Choose the output strategy based on asset type and pipeline constraints.
formats.legacy: Stable legacy exports for broad compatibility.
formats.modern: Modern codecs for stronger compression and better web delivery.
formats.auto_desc: Chooses the best candidate by final size and minimum quality threshold.
formats.visual_legacy_desc: Assets with fallback requirements and broader browser support.
formats.visual_modern_desc: Prefer smaller payloads when current browser support is enough.
formats.visual_auto_desc: Let the engine score candidates before choosing final output.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.description: Files stay in browser memory. No upload to third-party servers. No account required.
privacy.note: The product promise is direct: local processing, lower risk surface and a more predictable path for real production use.
privacy.local_desc: Assets stay inside the browser session while the Worker executes the pipeline.
privacy.boundary_desc: No account, no server queue and no hidden upload path to understand.
privacy.visual_memory_desc: Suitable for sensitive internal assets and pre-publication batches.
privacy.visual_trust_desc: The product promise is clear enough to audit without reading backend code.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Can I use this for production assets?
faq.a1: Yes. Use balanced mode as the default and validate AVIF/WebP fallback in your delivery pipeline.
faq.a2: After the initial load, processing is fully local and does not rely on remote APIs.
faq.q3: Will there be a desktop version?
faq.a3: Yes. This architecture is being prepared for a future Tauri shell without rewriting the core logic.
faq.intro: Frequently asked questions about processing, privacy and compatibility.
faq.card_title: Fast answers for real workflow blockers
faq.card_desc: Use the FAQ to understand trust, offline behavior and where desktop fits into the roadmap.
faq.support_desc: Open an issue with a sample image and expected output so we can prioritize the next fixes.

about.title: About Imaginizim
about.description: Imaginizim is an open-source initiative focused on high-quality, private and predictable image optimization for web teams.
about.note: The product direction is app-first: less friction on the home screen, more operational clarity, and a credible desktop path later.
about.visual_web_desc: Static deploy today with low-friction access and no backend dependency.
about.visual_core_desc: The current modular engine already points to a Tauri shell without a product reset.

footer.caption: Local image compression for real production workflows: fast, private and predictable.
footer.signature: Imaginizim • local image optimization, without unnecessary noise
footer.repo_cta: View repository, roadmap and history on GitHub

preview.title: Preview
preview.help_split: Drag the divider over the image for a side-by-side comparison.
preview.help_overlay: Drag the control to blend the optimized image over the original.
